name: Nutrition Question
about: Ask the Diet Director a nutrition question — it will route your question to the right specialist department and return an answer.
title: 'Question: '
labels: 'question'
assignees: ''

## Your Question

<!-- Write your nutrition question here. Be as specific as you like. -->


## Topic (optional — helps with routing)

<!-- Tick the box that best matches your question. If unsure, leave it blank and the Director will decide. -->

- [ ] Food types / food quality / ingredients
- [ ] Vitamins, minerals, or nutrients
- [ ] Meal planning / meal prep / grocery lists
- [ ] Food texture / chewing or swallowing difficulty
- [ ] Food allergies, intolerances, or dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free, etc.)
- [ ] Sports nutrition / athletic performance
- [ ] Weight management / metabolism / BMI
- [ ] Gut health / digestive health / probiotics
- [ ] Life stage nutrition (pregnancy, infant, teen, senior, etc.)
- [ ] Not sure — let the Director decide

## About You (optional — helps give a more relevant answer)

**Age range:** <!-- e.g. 30s, 50s -->
**Any dietary restrictions?** <!-- e.g. vegan, nut allergy, none -->
**Any health conditions relevant to your question?** <!-- e.g. IBS, diabetes, none -->

---
> Your question will be routed by the **Diet Director (bot_21)** to the correct specialist department (bots 22–30). If your question spans multiple topics the Director will compile a combined answer. If no department matches, the Director answers directly using full library access.
